title: Give feedback about Get Help
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: On any screen in the Get Help app, select the Give Feedback button at the top right of the screen.
Select the type of feedback you wish to give.
Give a complement: Did you have a great experience using Get Help? Were you able to quickly solve your problem? Let us know so we can help others find the same resolution.

Report a problem: Found an issue with the Get Help app? Report it to help improve the Get Help experience. The more detail you can give us about the problem, the more it helps us to find a resolution. Note: Submit feedback for issues with Get Help. If you have issues with Microsoft Office apps, please contact support.
Make a suggestion: Have an idea to make Get Help better or more useful? We'd love to hear it! Let us know.

Want more options? Discover Community Explore subscription benefits, browse training courses, learn how to secure your device, and more.
